content.rendered:
Urban Mass Transit Company Limited (UMTC) is India’s premier urban transport consultancy, recognized for its expertise in planning, designing, and delivering sustainable urban mobility solutions. Established through a unique partnership between the Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs (MoHUA), Government of Andhra Pradesh, APSRTC, and IL&FS, UMTC works closely with government bodies, ULBs, and international agencies to create efficient, inclusive, and future ready transport systems.

Our multidisciplinary team of planning and engineering professionals brings extensive experience across all modes of urban mobility—from city bus systems, BRT, and metro to TOD planning and inland waterways. UMTC provides comprehensive services including policy advisory, transport planning, infrastructure design, project implementation support, and capacity building. We are committed to shaping smart, accessible, and sustainable cities across India and beyond.
